name: TextField
description: Single-line text input field with label, placeholder, leading/trailing icons, adornments, floating label, character counter, clearable, validation, and Color/Variant/Size controls.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: Current value of the input. Supports @bind-Value.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Label text shown for the field.

parameters.name: Placeholder
parameters.description: Placeholder when field is empty.

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the field.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error text; overrides HelperText and marks field invalid.

parameters.name: Color
parameters.description: Semantic color for the focus/active border.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Visual variant: Default, Filled, Outlined.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Control size: Xs..Xl. Medium is default.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the field (no input, dimmed).

parameters.name: ReadOnly
parameters.description: Makes field read-only.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks field as required (visual + native).

parameters.name: LeadingIcon
parameters.description: Icon rendered inside the leading edge of the input.

parameters.name: TrailingIcon
parameters.description: Icon rendered inside the trailing edge of the input.

parameters.name: AdornmentStart
parameters.description: Leading adornment (e.g. currency symbol, prefix).

parameters.name: AdornmentEnd
parameters.description: Trailing adornment (e.g. unit label, suffix).

parameters.name: FloatingLabel
parameters.description: Animated floating label that moves above input on focus.

parameters.name: MaxLength
parameters.description: Max characters allowed. 0 = no limit.

parameters.name: Clearable
parameters.description: Shows clear (x) button when non-empty.

parameters.name: ShowCharacterCount
parameters.description: Shows character counter in supporting-text row.

parameters.name: FullWidth
parameters.description: When true fills container width; false = content-sized.

parameters.name: Margin
parameters.description: Vertical margin: None, Dense, Normal.

parameters.name: Typo
parameters.description: Optional typography scale override for input text.

parameters.name: Immediate
parameters.description: Update on every keystroke (oninput) vs on change/blur.

parameters.name: DebounceInterval
parameters.description: Debounce ms for Immediate updates. 0 = no debounce.

parameters.name: For
parameters.description: Expression to bind and validate against EditContext.

parameters.name: Error
parameters.description: Forces error visual state without a message.

events.name: OnKeyDown
events.description: Invoked on keydown in the input.

events.name: OnKeyUp
events.description: Invoked on keyup in the input.
